title: Obvious Powder snow
description: This makes powder snow noticeable to prevent falling inside!
body:
# Tired of **sinking** into powder snow without warning?

This texture pack makes powder snow **stand out**, so you can easily see where it is and avoid falling in. Enjoy exploring snowy areas without those surprise drops!

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e04efa19371ffbdaed833169739ac4193b48aa.png)
